## Markdown 内容

请按 `docs/markdown-question-bank.md` 的格式粘贴题目，或提交 PR 放入 `contrib/question-banks/`。

````md
```question
id:
subject:
type:
source:
chapter:
tags: []
correct:
```

题干

A. 选项
B. 选项

```analysis
解析
```
````
